mission: Cycle 19 gate-0: alien-grade ledger refresh + 6-component v2 schema. Reflects cycle-18 anomaly-3 remediation (lean_mechanical_pct 8/11 stale -> 11/11 = 1.0) and adds peer_review_status as 6th component (T0 binary stack: 0.00/0.33/0.66/1.00) lifting ceiling from 5.0 to 6.0. Option B (additive 6th component) chosen over A (rebalance) and C (tier-system) to preserve cycle 7-18 grade history exactly (peer_review = 0 across history). v2 also fixes v1 PARTIAL-RESOLVED-* prefix matching bug and scopes peer_review to hexa-weave papers only (citation DOIs in unrelated papers do NOT count, raw 91 C3 honest).

options_rejected.A_rebalance: would shift cycle 11/13/16/17 grades downward by ~10%; raw 91 C3 violation
options_rejected.C_tier_system: each tier reset inflates grade without measurement change; fabricated progress risk

new_component.name: peer_review_status
new_component.scope: hexa-weave papers only (filename contains 'hexa-weave'); 'NOT submitted to any preprint' substring short-circuits to T0

tier_T1.trigger: OWN arxiv URL or OurDOI line in paper md (citation DOIs explicitly excluded)

new_component.raw_53_compliance: deterministic binary file check; no human judgment, no network call
new_component.raw_91_c3_disclose: tier T1 detection requires line-anchored regex (preprint:|arxiv:) or OurDOI (capital O) prefix; bare doi: lines in citation lists do NOT trigger

v1_bug_fixes: PARTIAL-RESOLVED-* prefix matching (v1 missed F-MANUAL-LOGIN PARTIAL-RESOLVED-11-OF-12; v2 counts any 'PARTIAL-RESOLVED' prefix at 0.5 credit)
selftest cycle 16 expected widened from 4.27 (v1 ±0.40 tol) to 4.57 (v2 ±0.10 tol; the 5-component formula naturally diverges from lean-only census)

estimate_vs_measured.delta_explanation: cycle-18 estimate slightly high (0.0011); falsifier corpus grew 61 -> 70, dropping the resolution ratio even though resolved-credit climbed to 16.5

raw_91_c3_disclose.hexa_runner_exec_path_anomaly: the .hexa wrapper sometimes spawns sh that cannot resolve python3 in this environment; v2 measurement was emitted via direct python3 stdin heredoc (raw 9 hexa-only entrypoint preserved as primary, direct python3 as fallback), reproducing the v2 py_backend embedded in tool/alien_grade_audit.hexa
raw_91_c3_disclose.peer_review_T0_baseline: papers/hexa-weave-formal-mechanical-w2-2026-04-28.md explicitly says 'NOT submitted to any preprint server'; T0 = 0.00 is honestly emitted
raw_91_c3_disclose.fabricated_metric_avoided: early test mistakenly returned T1=0.33 because consciousness-red-team-n6-failure-2026-04-15.md contains citation DOIs; v2 scopes to filename-contains-hexa-weave AND requires line-anchored OWN preprint markers
raw_91_c3_disclose.raw_91_c3_inflation_risk_check: PASS — peer_review = 0 across cycles 7-18 historic grades unchanged; cycle 19 grade 4.7902 is fully derivable from HEAD; ceiling 6.0 explicitly external-dependent

raw_71_pre_registration: F-PEER-REVIEW-T1 (deadline 2027-04-28; arxiv submission of hexa-weave paper)
next_cycle_path: cycle 20+: HEXA-COMP 4-axiom mechanical sweep to push lean_mechanical denominator beyond Felgner-only basis. cycle 22+: arxiv submission of hexa-weave paper -> T1 (+0.33). cycle 25+: zenodo deposit unblock -> T2 (+0.33; gated on user resolution of 7-item checklist). cycle 25+ may also integrate per-cycle automatic --measure via hive init (rate-limited by per-second dedup marker).
